title: Walk-in Drive Financial Analyst at CCAvenue Global Group

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Financial Analyst at CCAvenue Global Group
jsonLd.description:
CCAvenue Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Vijayawada. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About CCAvenue Global Group:
CCAvenue Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CCAvenue Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
